item.title: Bombardiro
item.description: Bombardiro Crocodilo (sometimes Bombardino or Bombardilo) is a military bomber with the head of a crocodile superimposed. He was created by TikTok user @armenjiharhanyan on February 20th, 2025.

item.title: Tralalero
item.description:
Tralalero Tralala, sometimes spelt as Tralalelo Tralala, is the first and one of the most popular Italian brainrot characters.

He has the appearance of a blue shark, with elongated side fins that create legs. On his three feet, he wears blue Nike shoes. He appears in a beach setting, with sea waves and seagulls in the background. Additionally, the original video with Tralalero Tralala also includes a repeated explosion effect from CapCut.

item.title: TripleT
item.description:
<h1>Hello</h1>

Tung Tung Tung Sahur (properly Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Sahur) is an Indonesian brainrot character published on the 28th of February, 2025 by @noxaasht. Tung Tung Tung Sahur is an anthropomorphic log who wields a baseball bat as a weapon.

According to the sound, if you are called for Sahur (an early breakfast in Ramadan) and do not respond, then he will come for you
